ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_HPCU_UDS_VC_20200622
ddt:Target.Description:
[3]Jun 22nd, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified Auto-identification.
[2]May 28th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Resolved DB checker errors.
[1]Mar 30th, 2020 Nissan XX6 1. Added DM items. 2. Changed DB name and CANID and TargetAddress.
[N]Mar26th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Initial creation, based on Rev3.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
[P1C12](TBD)Electric expansion valve for battery cooler Stuck
[B2443](TBD)Water cooled condensor outlet temp sensor circuit
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: coolant temp. target for thremal recovery.param
coolant actual temp. for thremal recovery.param
DataRead.FFD_$3005_#004_bit0_(TBD)Inner condenser outlet temperature sensor value
DataRead.FFD_$3006_#004_bit0_(TBD)Inner condenser inlet temperature sensor value
DataRead.FFD_$3007_#004_bit0_(TBD)Outer condenser outlet temperature sensor value
DataRead.FFD_$300B_#004_bit0_(TBD)Outer condensor ice level calculated value
DataRead.FFD_$300F_#004_bit0_(TBD)Battery cooling entry temperature target value
DataRead.FFD_$3010_#004_bit0_(TBD)Battery cooling entry temperature real value
DataRead.FFD_$3013_#004_bit0_(TBD)Battery cooling entry temperature target flag
DataRead_$301A_#004_bit0_(TBD)coolant temp. target for thremal recovery
DataRead_$301B_#004_bit0_(TBD)coolant actual temp. for thremal recovery
OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.
